mapreducescript.description: Vertex AR Outbound Map/Reduce e-Invoice integration (polls for ready AR transactions and triggers UBL payload push to Vertex via Restlet)
mapreducescript.name: Vertex AR Outbound MR

scriptcustomfield.description: The value for partnerIdentifier used by NetSuite e-Invoicing RESTlets
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Partner Identifier

scriptcustomfield.description: Script ID of Vertex Outbound Restlet (for each AR message payload)
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Outbound Restlet ScriptID

scriptcustomfield.description: Deploy ID of Vertex Outbound Restlet (for each AR message payload)
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Outbound Restlet DeployID

scriptcustomfield.description: Use canned outbound-ready response for demo testing when NetSuite e-Invoicing RESTlets are unavailable.
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Demo Mode
